experience.description: Working as a full-time Frontend Engineer building and maintaining enterprise-grade admin dashboard products. Developing responsive UI components using C# and Ember.js, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

Completed an 8-month frontend engineering internship, contributing to production-level dashboard features. Gained hands-on experience with Ember.js framework, API integration, and agile development workflows.
Developed cross-platform mobile applications using React Native and Java. Built and tested mobile UI components, integrated backend APIs, and participated in the full app development lifecycle.

Completed a 6-month cybersecurity internship gaining practical experience in network security, vulnerability assessment, and ethical hacking fundamentals. Worked with industry-standard security tools and techniques.
